title: DocLayNet Document Layout Analysis
description: Document layout analysis with bounding box annotations. Annotators draw bounding boxes around layout elements (text blocks, tables, figures, headers, footers, lists) in document page images.
citation:
@inproceedings{pfitzmann2022doclaynet,
    title = "{DocLayNet}: A Large Human-Annotated Dataset for Document-Layout Segmentation",
    author = "Pfitzmann, Birgit  and Auer, Christoph  and Dolfi, Michele  and Nassar, Ahmed S.  and Staar, Peter",
    booktitle = "Proceedings of the 28th ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining",
    pages = "3743--3751",
    year = "2022",
    publisher = "ACM",
    url = "https://dl.acm.org/doi/10.1145/3534678.3539043"
}
